notes: Good-failure adversarial case: the artifact path .laguna/ exists at the workspace root (because the inventory itself lives there) and a naive model that lists the top level without filtering will include ".laguna" in entries[]. The gold here is that exact mistake — schema-valid and internally consistent (total_files matches the sum of claimed file counts), but listing ".laguna" as a top-level directory. The validator's entries-match-tree check enforces the excluded-set rule, so its rejection IS the correct outcome and expected_status is "fail". Live-run caveat: a model that correctly excludes .laguna/ will produce a passing artifact, which mismatches expected_status; that filtering behavior is read out of transcripts during error analysis. Synthetic fixture; no customer data.
